offer: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients, inconsistent reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate depreciation schedules instead of manual calculations and spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent and delayed asset depreciation reporting
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting advice
Engage on Indie Hackers about similar tools
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Join community forums for accounting tools discussions
try_it: Let users manually enter asset details and generate reports
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Set default reminder schedules for reports
Enable CSV import for existing asset data
Facilitate one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
